metadata.description: Quote a real convention from the repo before you write code. The skill shape that actually changes agent behavior, backed by ~930 graded runs.

plugins.name: quote-before-code
plugins.description: Forces a coding agent to find and quote a real convention from the repo before writing code, so it reuses what exists instead of reinventing a plausible-but-wrong version. A controlled study (~930 graded runs) found a generic 'ground your work' principle changed nothing (0/40 reuse) while this executable procedure with a hard stop took reuse to 100%. Auto-triggers on changes to an existing codebase.
